Memo: Received on: 2026-03-31<p/> Description: Black / Tan<p/>  Neutered Male Doberman Pinscher Dog<p/> Age: 1 YEAR 7 MONTHS<p/> Adoption Fee: $50.00<p/> Current Location: King County Pet Adoption Center 21615 64TH AVE S KENT, WA 98032<p/>Hi, my name is Heath and I'm available for adoption!  I'm a 1yr 7mo old male black/tan Beauceron dog (ID #A745048).  I was brought in by a good Samaritan on March 31, 2026.  At 98lbs I am considered a large breed dog.<p/><p/>I am a very smart boy and am practicing how to "sit" and "shake".  I also have a very affectionate side and would be thrilled to play with you at home!  I am full of energy and love to play!  I tend to calm down more when the people around me stay calm.  I do best when I have lots of exercise and something to keep my mind busy.  I would do best in a home with older children.  I am a spirited dog with a fun-loving personality!  I am still working on my manners, so I would do best with a family who is willing to work with me and help me become the best dog I can be!<p/><p/>I am neutered, current on vaccinations, and microchipped!  I was nominated for Pet of the Week on April 14, 2026.  This means that my adoption fee has been reduced!  This adoption fee includes a King County pet license (if applicable).  This helps my safe return home should I become lost, and comes with additional benefits such as Vacation Pet Alert, Free Ride Home and more (visit our pet licensing page for more info)!  My new family can also benefit from enrolling me in Fetch Pet Insurance.  Fetch offers the most comprehensive plan in North America with no restrictions on breed, age, or size.  Together, RASKC and Fetch are making sure pets are happy and healthy in their new forever homes!<p/><p/>If you are looking for an affectionate and energetic guy to add to your family, and are ready to fall in love with my pawesome self, please come down to RASKC to visit me!  You can find out more about me and my other friends on our website at www.kingcounty.gov/adoptapet.  Also look for me on Instagram with #heathkingcountypetsa745048.  You can find out more information on our adoption process on our website as well.  If you have more questions, you can contact RASKC via phone at 206-296-7387 (PETS) or email pets@kingcounty.gov.  If you want to meet me or other pets in person, RASKC is open from noon to 5pm Monday through Friday, and noon to 4pm on Saturday and Sunday.  Our address is 21615 64th Ave S, Kent, WA 98032.<p/>

Memo: Received on: 2026-03-10<p/> Description: Bl Brindle Spayed Female Pit Bull Dog<p/> Age: 3 YEARS 7 MONTHS<p/> Adoption Fee: $50<p/> Current Location: In RASKC Foster Home <p/>Hi, my name is Whisp and I`m available for adoption! I arrived at RASKC on 3/10/26 after being abandoned at a park with all my belongings.  When I first came in I weighed just 35lbs and was very underweight.  However, with lots of care and regular meals, I`ve already made amazing progress and am up to 42lbs!  My healthy goal is around 45-50lbs and I`m well on my way!<p/><p/><p/><p/>At first, I wasn`t sure about people, but once I realized I was safe, my true personality started to shine.  Now, I`m all about love, attention and giving as many kisses as you`ll allow!  I`m a sweet and affectionate girl with a bold and bright spirit, just like my Leo zodiac sign.  Leos are known for their big hearts, confidence, and love of being around their people...just like me!  I adore attention, thrive on connection, and bring a warm, joyful energy wherever I go.<p/><p/><p/><p/>I`m an active girl who loves to run, play and go on long walks.  If you`re looking for a companion to keep you moving and smiling, then I`m your girl!  I can be a little jumpy sometimes, but that`s just my excitement bubbling over.  I`m so happy to meet new friends!  The good news is I`m very food motivated, which makes training fun and rewarding for both of us!  I`ve met some dogs at the shelter and seem to do well with pups my size.  If you have a dog at home, it`s recommended to bring them by for a meet-and-greet so we can see if we`re a perfect match.<p/><p/><p/><p/>I`ve been through a lot, but I haven`t lost my sparkle.  I`m ready for a fresh start with a family who will love me, guide me, and let me shine like the star I am!  Come meet me...I have a feeling we`re meant to find each other!<p/>
